title: 目標達成の後に・クラシックへ

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
It is the announcement day of my fan results.
With many of my followers having flocked to the
venue, the signal of my advance is set to come!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
A beacon of smoke drifts into the sky. Down with
the Golden Generation! With sweat-drenched
fists clenched, I vow to do battle with those
mighty foes!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Before this can be done, I must claim the first of
the Classic Triple Crown races, held atop the lush
greens of Nakayama—the Satsuki Sho!
